arts.ttl: Real Madrid received report on declining Kylian Mbappe physique before signing him
arts.sum: Real Madrid are currently trying to work out why one of the best forwards in the world looks so very far from the first 9 years of his professional career. Kylian Mbappe does still have nine goals for Los Blancos this season, but just two in his last nine appearances, which date back to September. arts.ttl: Player aware of Manchester City and Real Madrid interest – Transfer could be on cards
arts.sum: Manchester City and Real Madrid are in the picture to sign Al-Ahli’s Gabri Veiga, according to Estadio Deportivo. The Middle East club paid €30m to sign the midfielder from Celta Vigo in August 2023 and he has featured regularly for them, when available for selection. Veiga has played 18 matches in all competitions this season The post Player aware of Manchester City and Real Madrid interest – Transfer could be on cards appeared first on Sport Witness.

arts.ttl: Carlo Ancelotti 'is summoned to CRISIS talks by Real Madrid president Florentino Perez' amid poor start to defence of Champions League title
arts.sum: Los Blancos were outclassed at Anfield and now sit 24th in the league phase with two wins and three defeats from five games, meaning the club may fail to qualify for the knockout stages.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid 'inform Liverpool of desire' to sign Trent Alexander-Arnold in 2025
arts.sum: European champions Real Madrid reportedly inform Liverpool of their desire to sign England international Trent Alexander-Arnold in 2025.

arts.ttl: La Liga Complains to Real Madrid Over Vinicius Jr's Post During Liverpool Game
arts.sum: The Brazilian was injured for the European encounter and, thus, watched from the comfort of his own home.

arts.ttl: Vinicius And Real Madrid Out To Prove Themselves The Best After Snub
arts.sum: Real Madrid is eyeing a golden opportunity to heal the sting left by the Ballon d’Or. The FIFA The Best Awards for 2024, which honor performances across the calendar year, could serve as the perfect salve. This democratized approach resonates with Real Madrid, whose leadership has expressed dissatisfaction with the Ballon d’Or process, particularly after Vinicius and the club were conspicuously absent from October’s Paris ceremony.
